series_metadata.series_description: This file contains materials from the Center For Business & Economic Research, the Ohio Proud Telephone Survey, other marketing surveys, and information about Ohio Proud activities, promotions, and advertising. The Ohio Proud program promotes Ohio agricultural products.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Review partner files annually. Separate those partner files that are no longer active in the program and dispose of those that do not renew in the program after 1 year. ; Electronic: Review partner files annually. Separate those partner files that are no longer active in the program and dispose of those that do not renew in the program after 1 year., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
